pr.title: MDLM Diffusion — val_var_bpb 0.9901, EOS learning + full dataset shard rotation, 33M params, 1x AWS A10G

output.summary: MDLM v5 learns EOS anchors with a dedicated PAD token and rotates dataset shards so FineWeb trains fully without loading all data at once.
techniques: EOS boundary token never masked during diffusion
PAD ID separated from MASK to exclude structural padding from loss
Shard-rotation loader streams FineWeb shards in memory-constrained setups
